expectations.text: Handoff file exists under .claude/handoffs/<repo>/ with YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM_description.md filename
Frontmatter git_commit field matches a real commit hash from fixture history
expectations.evidence: git_commit: e1d2867 — verified against actual fixture: `git log --oneline` shows e1d2867 wip: add token bucket skeleton as the real second commit.
Task(s), Recent Changes, Learnings, Chronicle Candidates, Artifacts, Action Items & Next Steps, Other Notes — all seven present.

expectations.text: Content specifically references rate limiter/token bucket work, not generic
expectations.evidence: References exact line numbers (rate_limiter.py:8-10), exact method names (_refill, allow), exact TODO comments.
.gitignore output file contains exactly '.claude/handoffs/'; fixture had no .gitignore before.

expectations.text: Final message includes exact file path and /resume-handoff command
